********************************************************************************************* *** Phaser Module: AUTOMATED MOLECULAR REPLACEMENT 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
** Steps: ** Cell Content Analysis ** Anisotropy correction ** Translational NCS correction ** Rotation Function ** Translation Function ** Packing ** Refinement ** Final Refinement (if data higher resolution than search resolution) ** Number of search ensembles = 1 ** Search Method: FAST ** Input Search Order: ** #1 SearchModel ** Automatic (best predicted) search order WILL be used
CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 0.31 secs ( 0.31 secs) Finished: Sun Jul 12 22:59:25 2020

****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: CELL CONTENT ANALYSIS 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
Space-Group Name (Hall Symbol): P 21 21 21 ( P 2ac 2ab) Space-Group Number: 19 Unit Cell: 34.15 54.81 68.00 90.00 90.00 90.00
Composition is of type: PROTEIN MW to which Matthews applies: 14102 Resolution for Matthews calculation: 1.79
Z MW VM % solvent rel. freq. 1 14102 2.26 45.49 1.000 <== most probable
Z is the number of multiples of the total composition In most cases the most probable Z value should be 1 If it is not 1, you may need to consider other compositions
Most probable VM for resolution = 2.16185 Most probable MW of protein in asu for resolution = 14718.8
CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 0.70 secs ( 0.70 secs) Finished: Sun Jul 12 22:59:25 2020

****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: EXPECTED LLG OF ENSEMBLES 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
Resolution of Data (Selected): 1.792 (1.7924) Number of Reflections (Selected): 12183 (12179) eLLG Target: 225
----------------- POLY-ALANINE ELLG -----------------
Resolution = 1.7924 Default RMSD = 0.1 0.2 0.4 0.8 1.6 3.2 Minimum solvent = 20% Maximum number of polyalanine residues = 162 (-full-) Alanine residues for eLLG target = 40

Expected LLG (eLLG) ------------------- eLLG: eLLG of ensemble alone eLLG RMSD frac-scat Ensemble 2003.3 0.442 0.90108 SearchModel

eLLG indicates that placement of a single copy of ensemble "SearchModel" should be easy
